package rulecoverage

func PositiveBusinessValidationMixedWithPersistenceCallsInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "business_validation_mixed_with_persistence_calls_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that start querying or writing before finishing request validation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
